svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"13_near_loop_left","label":"Near left loop","topology":"Split the road near B0 into a left scenic branch and a main branch; reconnect them cleanly before the midpoint, forming one grounded teardrop loop.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
